MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Floyd Butler. John P. Baba, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Anthony Wilson Belmonte and Defendant, Gladis Sibrain appeared in pro per. The matter settled per written stipulation not read into the record.
